# Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

# Type Of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Model, dataset, or benchmark change
- [ ] Refactor or maintenance

# Validation

List the commands you ran and their results.

- [ ] `python -m pytest`
- [ ] `mkdocs build --strict`
- [ ] Manual documentation or notebook check, if relevant

# Public Release Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, credentials, private data, or local absolute paths.
- [ ] No generated outputs such as `site/`, checkpoints, caches, or temporary
      previews.
- [ ] Public-facing wording is confident, precise, and does not overclaim.
- [ ] Documentation links and Colab links work, if touched.
- [ ] Screenshots are attached for visual documentation changes.
